title: dactylorhiza lagotis
intro: Dactylorhiza lagotis, also known as the summer or autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza lagotis include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots and tubers of the plant can be dried and made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
